description: JWT Authentication Migration | Must not use external auth providers; Must maintain backward compatibility with Basic Auth
Refactor Auth Middleware | Preserve existing authentication flows
AI-Native Git Layer Implementation | Must distinguish AST_REFACTOR vs INTENT_EVOLUTION; Must generate SHA-256 hashes for file mutations
Context Injection Hook | Must block execution if no valid intent ID is declared
Security Validation Hook | Must enforce scope validation against owned_scope
Traceability Logging | Must include intent_id, mutation_class, relative file path, and partialhash
Governance Policy Enforcement | Must reject commands outside declared scope
Intent Evolution Tracking | Must distinguish AST_REFACTOR vs INTENT_EVOLUTION
